ai_tips: Starting out at 1005m — HR opened at 119 and climbed quickly toward working level, a brisk start. 从海拔1005米出发——心率从119起步，开场阶段很快升到工作区间，开局偏快。
0.96km in — pace 25:46/km, HR 131 (84% of the run average) as the effort builds. 进行到0.96公里——配速25:46/公里，心率131（全程均值的84%），强度正在建立。
Halfway to the high point — 2m of the 7m climb done, grade here 1%, HR 103. Short, quick steps keep this efficient. 爬升至最高点过半——7米总爬升已完成2米，此处坡度1%，心率103。缩小步幅、加快步频会更省力。
High point of the route: 1012m at 3.96km, HR 165. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点1012米，位于3.96公里处，心率165。此后路线总体向下。
Steepest descent of the day: -13.4% at 4.00km — you let it flow at 4:08/km, good downhill confidence. 全天最陡的下坡：4.00公里处坡度-13.4%——你顺势加速到4:08/公里，下坡信心不错。
4.64km — late-run check: pace 5:07/km, HR 164, still holding form well. 4.64公里——后程检查：配速5:07/公里，心率164，节奏保持得不错。

Finished 4.84km in 24:32 (avg 5:04/km, avg HR 156, max 174, +29m). Next time, close with 2-3 minutes of easy jogging to bring HR down before stopping. 完成4.84公里，用时24:32（平均配速5:04/公里，平均心率156，最高174，爬升29米）。下次结尾慢跑2-3分钟，让心率降下来再停。
